Author: James
Name: Housing NPC Pose
Punchline: Client-side housing NPC pose automation with visual Y offsets and nameplate hiding.
Description: v0.4.1 scene preset build. Adds named room scene presets that snapshot all saved actor pose/Y assignments for the current area, then load them back by replacing the current area saved assignments and applying them locally. Keeps the v0.4 actor dropdown, searchable pose browser, category filters, quick scene poses, and stable client-side pose/Y/nameplate/auto-apply system. Lists visible housing NPC/object candidates, blocks known non-humanoid creature NPCs, saves local pose assignments plus optional visual Y offsets, reconciles known pose params against CSV emote/action metadata, and keeps discovery tools under Advanced. Client-side only: no packets, spawning, server-side movement, hooks, or effects on other clients.
